<!--
Thanks for contributing to DevLens! Please fill this out so reviews go fast.
Keep PRs focused — one logical change each. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

What does this PR do, and why?

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🔬 New / updated analysis rule
- [ ] 🤖 AI layer change
- [ ] 📤 Output / report change
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)

## If this adds or changes an analysis rule

- Rule id:
- Category / severity:
- Languages:

**Fires on (positive case):**

```
paste a snippet that should be flagged
```

**Correctly ignores (negative / near-miss case):**

```
paste a similar snippet that should NOT be flagged
```

## Testing checklist

- [ ] Analysis runs end-to-end with **no API keys set**
- [ ] Verified on at least one real repo / sample input
- [ ] All four output modes (Vibe / Junior / Senior / Bounty) render correctly
- [ ] No new console errors during a full analysis
- [ ] No regressions in Quick Wins, Spaghetti, Dead Code, Graph, or PDF export

## Project constraints (please confirm)

- [ ] Change stays within a single `index.html` (no build step)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
- [ ] Static analysis still works without AI
- [ ] No code or keys are sent anywhere except the user's own AI provider

Anything reviewers should know.
